name: gh-repo
title: GitHub Repo Search
description: Search repositories of given GitHub orgs/users and open them in the browser.
author: jmblog

commands.name: search-repositories
commands.title: Search Repositories
commands.description: Search repositories of the configured orgs/users

preferences.name: orgs
preferences.title: Orgs / Users
preferences.description: GitHub orgs or users to list repositories for. Separate multiple with spaces or commas.
